prompt: Hyper-realistic fashion portrait. Adult East Asian female, over 21, standing in a modern sophisticated outdoor corridor near a white-painted brick wall and tall black-framed windows. Slightly to the right, framed from the waist to mid-thigh. The left side of the frame retains ample architectural space, with windows and the walkway extending into the distance. Strong vertical lines from brick pillars and dark window frames create a clean contemporary geometric background. Figure: Torso mostly forward, shoulders rotated very slightly toward the viewer's left. Relaxed, elegant, and confident posture. One arm hangs naturally by the side; the opposite hand elegantly raised toward a hair strand near the temple, fingers lightly touching a loose lock. Head upright with a slight tilt, looking directly at the camera—a dignified, low-key confident expression, a faint closed-mouth smile. Hair and Jewelry: Very long glossy black hair, soft voluminous waves, center-parted, falling over shoulders, natural strands framing the cheekbones. Realistic shine, fine individual strands, gentle movement, rich tonal variations from deep black to soft charcoal gray highlights. Medium-sized bright gold hoop earrings. A thin low-key ring on the raised hand. Makeup: Sophisticated and natural—glowing fair skin, real pores, fine tonal variations. Soft brow shape, refined brownish-black eyeliner, long thick lashes, restrained peach blush, gentle cheekbone contouring, low-key rose nude lips with a soft satin texture. Natural elegant facial proportions; no excessive airbrushing or exaggerated features. Clothing: Fitted dark coffee sleeveless turtleneck top—soft, matte, fine knit, high neckline, clean armholes, fine elasticity, realistic seam structure, gentle folds at the waist, slight tension lines on the torso. champagne beige high-waisted satin midi skirt from the hips down—smooth silky luster, flowing drape, fine diagonal highlights, soft creases, elegant neutral tones contrasting with the dark top. Scene: Minimalist upscale urban corridor—white neat brick pillars on the right, large floor-to-ceiling black metal window frames on the left, light stone or concrete paving. Faint reflections of green trees in the glass, soft-focus blurred interior visible through the window. Background is low-key, modern, and uncluttered; the corridor forms a natural leading line extending to the left. Lighting: Soft diffused daylight from the front-left, similar to a bright overcast day. Gentle highlights on forehead, cheekbones, hair strands, shoulders, arms, gold earrings, and satin skirt. Delicate shadows under the jaw, neck, inside hair, and around the waist. Cool neutral architectural tones balanced with warm skin, dark coffee brown, champagne satin, and gold accents. Camera: 85mm, eye-level, f/2, sharp focus on eyes and face, smooth background separation, realistic skin and textile details, sophisticated neutral tones, soft contrast, clean dynamic range, fine natural bokeh.

promptZh: 超写实时尚人像。成年东亚女性，21 岁以上，站在靠近白色砖墙和高大黑色边框窗户的现代精致户外走廊中。略微偏右，取景范围从腰部到大腿中部。画面左侧保留了充足的建筑空间，窗户和走廊向远处延伸。砖柱和深色窗框形成的强烈垂直线条，营造出简洁的现代几何背景。人物：躯干大部分朝前，肩膀向观众左侧略微旋转。姿态放松、优雅且自信。一只手臂自然垂在身侧；另一只手优雅地抬起，手指轻触太阳穴附近的一缕发丝。头部直立并略微倾斜，直视镜头——表情庄重、内敛自信，嘴角带着淡淡的闭口微笑。发型与配饰：非常长的亮泽黑发，柔软蓬松的波浪卷，中分，垂在肩上，自然的发丝修饰着颧骨。逼真的光泽，细腻的单根发丝，轻柔的动态，从深黑到柔和炭灰高光的丰富色调变化。中等大小的亮金色圆环耳环。抬起的手上戴着一枚精致低调的戒指。妆容：精致自然——透亮的白皙皮肤，真实的毛孔，细腻的色调变化。柔和的眉形，精致的棕黑色眼线，长而浓密的睫毛，克制的桃色腮红，柔和的颧骨轮廓，低调的玫瑰裸色嘴唇，带有柔和的缎面质感。自然优雅的面部比例；没有过度的磨皮或夸张的特征。服装：修身的 深咖啡色 无袖高领上衣——柔软、哑光、细针织，高领口，干净的袖口，良好的弹性，逼真的接缝结构，腰部有柔和的褶皱，躯干上有轻微的拉伸纹理。香槟米色 高腰缎面中长裙，从臀部向下——平滑的丝绸光泽，流动的垂坠感，细腻的对角线高光，柔和的褶皱，优雅的中性色调与深色上衣形成对比。场景：极简主义高端城市走廊——右侧是整洁的白色砖柱，左侧是大型落地黑色金属窗框，浅色石材或混凝土铺地。玻璃中映出绿色树木的淡淡倒影，透过窗户可以看到虚化的室内景象。背景低调、现代且整洁；走廊形成了向左延伸的自然引导线。灯光：来自左前方的柔和漫射日光，类似于明亮的阴天。前额、颧骨、发丝、肩膀、手臂、金耳环和缎面裙上有柔和的高光。下颌、颈部、发丝内部和腰部周围有细腻的阴影。冷色调的中性建筑色调与温暖的肤色、深咖啡棕、香槟色缎面和金色点缀相平衡。相机：85mm 镜头，平视角度，f/2 光圈，焦点清晰对准眼睛和面部，背景虚化平滑，皮肤和纺织品细节逼真，精致的中性色调，柔和的对比度，干净的动态范围，细腻自然的焦外成像。
